element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic for destroying enemies and breaking soft blocks

element_introduction_order.element: Soft blocks vs hard blocks distinction
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Puzzle-solving through trial; no visual differentiation requires experimentation or manual consultation
Requires breaking soft blocks; rewards hidden item discovery
One per room; fully restores and extends health bar
Defeat required to advance to next story; drops crystal ball power-up
Enlarges bubbles and extends projectile range; cumulative from boss defeats
Access to second and subsequent castle stories unlocked progressively
Time pressure to re-enter castle; adds tension to exploration
Cumulative side quest; new instrument/elf added per completion; song elaboration reward
Various power-ups and tools; some require crystal ball progression to unlock

element_introduction_order.first_appears: One per story after ground floor
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each drops crystal; progression gates access to higher castle stories
Final confrontation; requires all prior progression and power-ups

typical_relief_triggers: Finding and collecting honeycomb health restoration
typical_tension_triggers: Entering new castle room with multiple enemies
Lightning bolts falling outside castle (time pressure)
Health bar depleting without nearby honeycomb
Navigating non-linear room layouts with hidden required passages
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: High friction exploration-puzzle platformer with punctuated boss confrontations; tension sustained through permadeath mechanic and hidden progression gates; relief provided by rare health restoration and power-up acquisition

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Soft blocks visually indistinguishable from hard blocks; breaking them reveals shops, items, and alternative routes
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Bubble projectiles trigger hidden block breaks; no visual cues; discovery requires systematic trial or manual guidance

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; introduces basic mechanics (bubbles, soft blocks, enemies) in ground floor exploration with frequent honeycomb availability
difficulty_curve.mid_game: High; multi-story progression requires chaining boss defeats; soft-block puzzle solving becomes mandatory; crystal ball progression gates later areas
difficulty_curve.late_game: Very high; final bosses and Maharito confrontation demand accumulated power-ups; no visual guidance for secret progression; one-life constraint punishes exploration errors
notable_spikes: First boss encounter transitions from exploration to combat
Each subsequent story boss requires increased precision and planning
Mahmaririto final boss represents culmination of all mechanics and power-ups
Non-linear room design creates difficulty spikes when critical progression secrets are hidden

notable_level_patterns.description: Each castle room contains fixed single exit; navigation is non-linear (not left-to-right); requires breaking soft blocks to find alternate paths and progression gates
Each castle story (four total plus well and towers) is unlocked only after defeating the preceding story's boss; crystal ball upgrades stack to unlock later areas
Six demon-beast bosses plus Maharito final boss; each defeat drops crystal and gates access to next story; permadeath mechanic makes boss runs high-stakes
Items sold in plain-sight shops, hidden shops (revealed by block breaks), and post-boss rewards; item costs and availability scale with progression
Music box discovery triggers Maze Song minigame; new instrument/elf added per collection; song elaborates; rewards score and thematic narrative
